mapper.select: SELECT id, message_id, session_id, user_id, tenant_id, user_msg, ai_reply, status, trace_id, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM cs_message WHERE deleted = FALSE AND message_id = #{messageId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cs_message ( id, message_id, session_id, user_id, tenant_id, user_msg, ai_reply, status, trace_id, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{messageId}, #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{tenantId}, #{userMsg}, #{aiReply}, #{status}, #{traceId}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, FALSE ) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
